CreateImage.imageName: Name of the custom image to create; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a letter; length 1-65
CreateImage.instanceId: ID of the instance used to create the image; mutually exclusive with snapshotId; if both are provided, instanceId takes precedence
CreateImage.snapshotId: ID of the snapshot used to create the image; mutually exclusive with instanceId; if both are provided, instanceId takes precedence
CreateImage.relateCds: Whether to create a large image containing all CDS disks; if true, the image cannot be encrypted and must be whitelisted; default is false
CreateImage.detection: Image detection configuration; not triggered if omitted; if true, detection runs automatically after image creation; if false, detection is skipped; default is false
